description_long: This object is a slender, elongated candle with a smooth, slightly tapered form and a pointed tip. The upper section is coated in a clean white color, transitioning sharply into a warm golden-yellow body that makes up the majority of its length. Near the base, a small section of dark gray or black coloring is visible, possibly representing a charred or decorative area. The surface appears even and unblemished, with no visible wax drips or irregularities. There is no visible wick or flame at the tip, and the candle does not appear to be set in any holder or base. Its streamlined design suggests it is intended for decorative use, likely on a tabletop or similar flat surface in an urban environment.
description: A slender, pointed candle with a white tip, golden-yellow body, and a small dark base, featuring a smooth, clean surface and no visible wick or holder.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white tip and golden-yellow body, with a pointed end and no visible wick or base details.
description_view_1: Opposite side view revealing a dark gray or black patch near the base, with the white tip and golden-yellow body still prominent.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the transition between the white tip, golden-yellow body, and the dark base area, with a smooth surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the white tip, golden-yellow body, and a subtle dark streak along the base, maintaining the candle's slender profile.
